name: cc-plugin-codex
description: Codex plugin that delegates setup, rescue, planning, UI, and review work to Claude Code.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate Codex tasks to Claude Code.
interface.longDescription: Claude Code Companion provides Codex skills and deterministic Node scripts for Claude Code setup diagnostics, rescue tasks, planning, UI/design help, structured review, and background job management.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use claude-setup to check whether Claude Code Companion is ready.
